data.name: Lewd Remedy
data.detailed_description:
Lewd Remedy is a unique adult life simulator game with compelling characters and lots of lewd situations.

After a car accident leaves you in a coma, doctors make a startling discovery: your love juice has invaluable properties. Now you'll be living under the care of two captivating women: Pam, a shy but lecherous middle-aged woman with a nurturing heart, and Cassy, a spirited woman with a sketchy past and a bratty attitude. 

You'll also be interacting with Nurse Espinoza, a cunning woman tasked with attending to your needs, and Doctor Marshall, who holds the key to managing your condition.

Navigate the complexities of your unusual situation and your relationships with your new roommates.

Game Features:

  • Form deep and complex relationships with your roommates through interactive choices and various activities.

  • Unlock intimate story arcs as you explore personal secrets, inner conflicts, and hidden ambitions.

  • Earn money by completing household tasks and engaging in special business opportunities with your nurse.

  • Manage your character’s fitness, hygiene, and other stats to improve performance in social interactions and unlock new opportunities.

data.short_description: A scandalous adult adventure! Your love juice just became a hot commodity. Live with Pam, a lustful yet shy caretaker, and Cassy, a rebellious firecracker. Seduce, scheme, and indulge in this steamy, unpredictable romp!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia Geforce 760
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
